title: Stormglass Weather Point Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the Stormglass weather point API response

fields.name: hours
fields.description: Hourly forecast data array

fields.name: time
fields.description: Timestamp in UTC

fields.name: airTemperature
fields.description: Air temperature in Celsius, keyed by data source

fields.name: windSpeed
fields.description: Wind speed in m/s at 10m height, keyed by source

fields.name: windDirection
fields.description: Wind direction in degrees (0=N), keyed by source

fields.name: gust
fields.description: Wind gust in m/s, keyed by source

fields.name: humidity
fields.description: Relative humidity in percent, keyed by source

fields.name: pressure
fields.description: Air pressure in hPa, keyed by source

fields.name: cloudCover
fields.description: Cloud cover in percent, keyed by source

fields.name: precipitation
fields.description: Precipitation in mm/h, keyed by source

fields.name: waveHeight
fields.description: Significant wave height in meters, keyed by source

fields.name: waveDirection
fields.description: Wave direction in degrees, keyed by source

fields.name: wavePeriod
fields.description: Wave period in seconds, keyed by source

fields.name: swellHeight
fields.description: Swell height in meters, keyed by source

fields.name: swellDirection
fields.description: Swell direction in degrees, keyed by source

fields.name: swellPeriod
fields.description: Swell period in seconds, keyed by source

fields.name: waterTemperature
fields.description: Water temperature in Celsius, keyed by source

fields.name: currentSpeed
fields.description: Ocean current speed in m/s, keyed by source

fields.name: currentDirection
fields.description: Ocean current direction in degrees, keyed by source

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Horizontal visibility in km, keyed by source

fields.name: seaLevel
fields.description: Sea level relative to MSL in meters, keyed by source

fields.name: meta
fields.description: Request metadata and quota information

fields.name: cost
fields.description: API credits consumed

fields.name: dailyQuota
fields.description: Daily request quota

fields.name: requestCount
fields.description: Requests made today

fields.name: lat
fields.description: Requested latitude

fields.name: lng
fields.description: Requested longitude

fields.name: params
fields.description: Parameters returned

fields.name: start
fields.description: Data start timestamp

fields.name: end
fields.description: Data end timestamp

sources.description: Data source abbreviations used as keys in parameter objects

values.ecmwf: European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts
